data.title: UBCF gives 160 free mattresses to breast cancer patients in Kentucky, providing rest and relief. Celebrated success.
data.description: In Louisville, Kentucky, the United Breast Cancer Foundation (UBCF) recently distributed 160 therapeutic mattresses to breast cancer patients and survivors. The Free Mattress Giveaway held last month was a significant success, providing much-needed support to individuals in need. This initiative aims to improve the comfort and well-being of those affected by breast cancer in the community.

data.title: S&P 500 achieved record close, with Nvidia and Google flashing buy signals amidst narrow market breadth.
data.description: On Tuesday, the market showed limited breadth, yet the S&P 500 achieved a new record closing high driven by positive movements from Nvidia and Google. Additionally, Dow Jones Futures were signaling an optimistic trend with the S&P 500 reaching a historic close. Nvidia and Google exhibited strong buying signals, indicating a bullish market sentiment. The record high was a significant move amidst the narrow market breadth, demonstrating the potential growth within the tech sector. This development highlights the positive momentum in the market, with notable companies like Nvidia and Google leading the way.

data.title: Gold Strategy Inc. (TSXV: GST) confirms a 25:1 share consolidation effective December 24, 2025.
data.description: In Vancouver, British Columbia, on December 23, 2025, Gold Strategy Inc. (TSXV: GST) disclosed their plan for a significant consolidation of their common share capital. The consolidation will take place on December 24, 2025, with a twenty-five-for-one ratio. This move aims to streamline the company's overall capital structure.

data.title: XTI Aerospace and Drone Nerds positioned to dominate U.S. commercial drone market post new FCC action on foreign-made UAS.
data.description: XTI Aerospace, headquartered in Englewood, Colorado, announced on Dec. 23, 2025, (Nasdaq: XTIA) that they are working towards developing an extensive unmanned aircraft system (UAS) platform for enterprise and government clients. The company aims to build and expand this technology for various applications.

data.title: SmartStop Self Storage REIT acquires 1.78-acre land in Toronto for Class A self-storage facility development.
data.description: A real estate investment trust, SmartStop Self Storage REIT, Inc. (NYSE: SMA), has acquired a 1.78-acre land parcel in Toronto, Ontario for developing a Class A self-storage facility. The partnership with SmartCentres (TSX: SRU.UN) will oversee the development at 1125 Finch Ave. This marks SmartStop's strategic move in expanding its presence in the US and Canada as a leading owner and operator of self-storage facilities.

data.title: Osisko Development acquires 8,571,429 units of Niobay Metals Inc. for $1.2 million at $0.14 per unit.
data.description: On December 18, 2025, Osisko Development Corp. (NYSE: ODV, TSXV: ODV) announced its acquisition of 8,571,429 units of Niobay Metals Inc. at a price of $0.14 per unit, totaling $1,200,000.06. This acquisition was made through Osisko Development's wholly-owned subsidiary, Barkerville Gold Mines Ltd. Each unit obtained in the private placement Offering included one Common Share and one Common Share purchase warrant of Niobay.

data.title: SI Group completes recapitalization, reducing debt by $1.7 billion, positioning for growth. Woodlands, Texas, Dec. 23, 2025.
data.description: Major Deleveraging Deal to Cut Overall Debt by Around $1.7 Billion THE WOODLANDS, Texas - SI Group, a top global producer of performance additives, process solutions, and chemical intermediates, announced a significant de-leveraging transaction. This move will result in a substantial reduction of approximately $1.7 billion in overall debt.

data.title: Investor rights law firm Halper Sadeh LLC urges UDMY, ALEX, UBFO, MRSN shareholders to discuss their rights. Limited time to enforce rights. Contact the firm.
data.description: Shareholders are advised to get in touch with the firm promptly, as there is a restricted timeframe to exercise your entitlements. On December 23, 2025, Halper Sadeh LLC, a law firm focusing on investor rights, disclosed that they are scrutinizing various companies for potential breaches of federal securities laws and/or violations.

data.title: Halper Sadeh LLC urges SNCR, HOLX, FRGE shareholders to discuss their rights, investigate potential violations. Contact firm now. NY, Dec. 23, 2025.
data.description: Investors are advised to get in touch with the company promptly as time may be running out to assert their rights. An investor rights law firm, Halper Sadeh LLC, based in New York, announced on December 23, 2025, through PRNewswire, that they are looking into several companies for potential breaches of federal securities laws or other violations. Shareholders should promptly reach out to ensure their rights are protected.

data.title: Halper Sadeh LLC urges KPLT, FOLD, DHIL shareholders to act quickly. Investigating potential violations. Contact firm.
data.description: Investor rights law firm Halper Sadeh LLC, based in New York, issued a statement on Dec. 23, 2025, informing shareholders to reach out to the company promptly due to a restricted timeframe to assert their rights. The firm is currently investigating multiple companies for potential breaches of federal securities laws and/or violations. Shareholders are urged to contact the firm for more information as soon as possible.

data.title: McGrath Quad Cities Harley-Davidson sold in Davenport, Iowa to Steven Towers by Mike and Pat McGrath with guidance from Performance Brokerage Services.
data.description: Performance Brokerage Services, a prominent player in dealership buy-sell transactions, disclosed the transfer of ownership of McGrath Quad Cities Harley-Davidson located in Davenport, Iowa. The sale was executed by Mike and Pat McGrath, with Steven Towers acquiring the dealership. This business deal was confirmed in Irvine, California on December 23, 2025. Performance Brokerage Services is recognized for leading dealership buy-sell activities in North America.

data.title: SN BioScience's 'SNB-101' anti-cancer drug granted US FDA Orphan Drug Designation for gastric cancer, Dec 10, 2025. CEO Young Hwan PARK announced it.
data.description: In Seongnam, South Korea, on December 23, 2025, SN Bioscience Inc. confirmed that the FDA awarded Orphan Drug Designation (ODD) on December 10 for gastric cancer, encompassing gastroesophageal junction cancer, to SNB-101 (containing SN-38). The company's CEO, Young Hwan PARK, revealed this significant milestone for their polymer-based treatment. The approval underscores the potential of SNB-101 in addressing a rare medical need, reflecting a pivotal moment in the company's commitment to advancing cancer care.

data.title: Headwall Investments bought Sunset Ridge Shopping Center in San Antonio, TX on Dec 23, 2025.
data.description: A commercial real estate investment and development firm called Headwall Investments, based in San Antonio, successfully completed the off-market purchase of Sunset Ridge Shopping Center. Specializing in neighborhood shopping centers and urban infill projects, the Texas-based firm finalized the acquisition on December 23, 2025.

data.title: Buenaventura produces first dore bar at San Gabriel gold operation in Peru. Milestone achieved as per planned timeline.
data.description: In Lima, Peru, Compañia de Minas Buenaventura S.A.A. (BVN) revealed that its new gold operation, San Gabriel in Moquegua, has generated its initial dore bar during commissioning tests, staying on schedule. The company, Peru's primary publicly-traded precious metals mining firm, is advancing towards finalizing agreements with the Min.
